descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Feat: add Devkit Contribution step at sprint end — privacy scan of sprint summary Findings sections, user opt-in to share via gh issue create or local export file fallback

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Retro_Rul: Fix: add Privacy Rule section — signal items must not reference project names, repo names, domain-specific paths, business logic terms, or client identifiers; includes bad/good phrasing examples
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Fix: Stage 1 — add step-positioning check; implementers must flag AC boundary-only positioning in multi-step sequences as an open question to PO

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/wiki/Testing_Gu: New: wiki template for Testing_Guidelines.md — sections with {{PLACEHOLDER}} markers filled by init project from tech stack scan
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/wiki/Developmen: New: wiki template for Development_Standards.md — git branching, commit format, testing standards, linting, file structure
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/wiki/Code_Revie: New: wiki template for Code_Review_Checklist.md — developer pre-PR checklist and TL review criteria
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/wiki/Language_S: New: wiki template for {Language}_Style_Guide.md — naming, error handling, concurrency, design patterns per detected language
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Sync_: Feat: add wiki files merge strategy — new template sections appended with [UPDATE REQUIRED]; existing project content never overwritten

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Fix: Stage 2 step 6 — add explicit status:testing label step and do-not-merge warning before proceeding to Stage 3
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Technical: Fix: §2 PR Approval — remove 'ready to merge' phrase; add explicit no-merge instruction. Fix: §3 — status:testing set before merge, not after
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Story_Sta: Fix: §1 Testing row — status:testing set after TL approval and before merge (QA tests dev branch)
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/QA_Rules_: Fix: §8 — add no-skip rule requiring escalation to user if sandbox/automation cannot be run; self-approval of skip is not permitted

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Feat: annotate all agent spawn calls with model assignments (Stage 1 implementers → sonnet; Stage 2 TL reviewer → opus; Stage 2 Dev peer reviewer → sonnet; Stage 3 QA → sonnet; Stage 4 PO behavioral → haiku; mid-impl consultation agents → sonnet)
Feat: annotate all agent spawn calls with model assignments (PO → sonnet; question-answering agents → sonnet)
Feat: annotate all agent spawn calls with model assignments (Stage 1 Dev/QA/BA → sonnet; Stage 1/2 TL → opus; Stage 2 PO → sonnet)

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/QA_Rules_: Fix: §4 coverage audit rule — updating broken tests is a regression fix, not new coverage; new behavior requires dedicated test cases regardless of architecture. Fix: §4 integration test skip — QA must report unlisted skip constraints to user first, then escalate to TL if directed
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Developer: Fix: §5 spec-first rule — when story has an API Spec Reference section, update the spec before writing any implementation code
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Fix: Stage 3 merge gate — add explicit warning that the Merge Procedure fires only at behavioral path step 9, not at Stage 3 entry

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/CLAUDE_S: New: shared CLAUDE.md template content (mode-neutral); replaces CLAUDE_TEMPLATE.md
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/github/CLAUDE_t: New: github-mode CLAUDE.md variant (references shared file)
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/strict/CLAUDE_t: New: strict-mode CLAUDE.md variant (references shared file)

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Sync_: Update: workflow files section now uses mode-specific paths templates/{mode}/workflows/ for split candidates

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/CLAUDE_TEMPLATE: Fix: removed analyze <requirement> row from Workflows table (Analyst_Workflow is devkit-only, not deployed to target projects)
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/instructions/pr: Fix: Story Closure Task steps 3-5 now mode-conditional (github: issue close via gh; strict: edit local story MD + append closure comment)

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/CLAUDE_TEMPLATE: Refactor: removed inline workflow content; replaced with clean routing table pointing to workflow files
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Sprin: Fix: Observations write rule now requires agent role prefix on agent-reported items
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Creat: Fix: added next-sprint resolution logic for both GitHub mode (gh issue list jq numeric sort + gh label list warning) and strict mode (glob + numeric parse)
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Plan_: Fix: Stage 4 step 4 — explicit feature/non-feature story label sub-bullets instead of implicit conditional
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Refin: Fix: replaced gh label list | grep (alphabetical sort bug) with gh issue list jq numeric sort for non-feature sprint identification; added gh label list warning
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Share: Fix: deletion pre-check — added trigger examples and proceed-immediately rationale; Stage 2 and Stage 3 fast-path fallback — added domain knowledge examples

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/instructions/pr: Fix: added explicit status rule forbidding status:ready promotion during plan sprint; tightened Step 5 label guidance for existing stories

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Sync_: Added auto-approve flag, changes.json description/checksum format, WebFetch curl fallback, Document_Index skip strategy, missing expected files check
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/scripts/check_d: New: SessionStart hook script for devkit version notification (Windows)
New: SessionStart hook script for devkit version notification (Mac/Linux)
